# Curriculum V3.0 content audit

This audit classifies all 53 current modules in current Catalog order.

| Current module | Action | V3 targets | Strengths | Contract gaps | Rationale |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `ai-overview` | `rebuild` | `ai-overview` | Uses house-price, spam, clustering, and RAG examples to distinguish learning types before tracing the complete training flow. | Needs a learner-produced task-framing artifact that identifies inputs, targets, feedback, evaluation evidence, and a failure risk for one chosen AI use case. | 重建现有“AI 入门总览”内容，使其对齐 ai-overview 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current AI Overview material into the evidence loop defined by ai-overview. |
| `python-notebook` | `rebuild` | `python-notebook` | Walks through NumPy shape checks, pandas tables, split/fit/predict/metric cells, and a reproducible notebook handoff. | Needs an assessed rerun from a clean kernel with pinned dependencies, seeded output checks, and an intentionally broken shape or data-state diagnosis. | 重建现有“Python 与 notebook 复现实验”内容，使其对齐 python-notebook 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Python and Notebook Reproduction material into the evidence loop defined by python-notebook. |
| `housing-price-project` | `rebuild` | `project-tabular-regression` | Connects CSV inspection, EDA, leakage-safe cleaning and splits, a linear baseline, MAE, R², and a documented next iteration. | Needs the V3 project deliverables to preserve a frozen config, controlled improvement against the baseline, residual plots, named failure examples, and limitations. | 重建现有“第一个端到端项目：房价预测”内容，使其对齐 project-tabular-regression 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current First End-to-End Project: Housing Price Prediction material into the evidence loop defined by project-tabular-regression. |
| `classification-project` | `rebuild` | `project-classification-evaluation` | Frames spam costs, vectorizes text, builds a LogisticRegression pipeline, varies score thresholds, compares precision/recall and ROC/AUC, and reviews errors. | Needs cross-validated threshold selection, leakage tests for text preprocessing, calibration evidence, versioned false-positive/false-negative examples, and a limitations reflection. | 重建现有“分类项目：垃圾邮件筛查”内容，使其对齐 project-classification-evaluation 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Classification Project: Spam Screening material into the evidence loop defined by project-classification-evaluation. |
| `model-selection` | `rebuild` | `model-selection` | Connects one-split risk, validation roles, K-fold CV, pipeline leakage, param_grid and mean_test_score, then reserves final refit and test review. | Needs an executable nested or locked-selection comparison that reports fold dispersion and demonstrates how repeated validation tuning biases the final claim. | 重建现有“模型选择与交叉验证”内容，使其对齐 model-selection 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Model Selection and Cross-Validation material into the evidence loop defined by model-selection. |
| `tree-forest` | `rebuild` | `tree-forest` | Builds from 2D rectangular splits through Gini, entropy and MSE to max_depth overfitting, bagging, random features, and feature-importance pitfalls. | Needs a scratch split calculation tied to code, train/validation depth curves, permutation-versus-impurity importance evidence, and a shortcut-feature failure case. | 重建现有“决策树与随机森林”内容，使其对齐 tree-forest 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Decision Trees and Random Forests material into the evidence loop defined by tree-forest. |
| `cnn-visualization` | `rebuild` | `cnn-visualization` | Makes local connectivity, weight sharing, kernel convolution, padding/stride output shapes, channel feature maps, pooling, and transfer learning visually computable. | Needs a NumPy convolution checked against PyTorch, an assessed shape trace, learned-filter or activation inspection, and an aliasing or distribution-shift failure example. | 重建现有“CNN 可视化入门”内容，使其对齐 cnn-visualization 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current CNN Visualization Primer material into the evidence loop defined by cnn-visualization. |
| `sequence-embedding-bridge` | `keep` | `sequence-embedding-bridge` | Explicitly distinguishes token IDs from continuous features and traces embedding lookup from [B,T] to [B,T,H] with positions, masks, and attention handoff. | Needs a small executable lookup-and-mask artifact plus a padding/position mistake whose tensor-level symptom learners must diagnose. | 保留现有“序列与 Embedding 桥接”内容，使其对齐 sequence-embedding-bridge 的证据闭环。 / keep the current Sequence and Embedding Bridge material into the evidence loop defined by sequence-embedding-bridge. |
| `attention-transformer` | `split` | `attention-qkv-multihead`, `transformer-blocks`, `small-transformer-training`, `decoding-sampling` | Computes a four-token QKV attention matrix, softmax weighted sums, [B,T,H] to [B,heads,T,d_head] splits, and the residual Transformer block flow. | Needs separate contracts for causal mask correctness, multi-head implementation, Transformer block invariants, small-model training evidence, and decoding/sampling failure analysis. | 拆分现有“Attention 与 Transformer 入门”内容，使其对齐 attention-qkv-multihead、transformer-blocks、small-transformer-training、decoding-sampling 的证据闭环。 / split the current Attention and Transformer Primer material into the evidence loop defined by attention-qkv-multihead, transformer-blocks, small-transformer-training, decoding-sampling. |
| `optimizer-comparison` | `merge` | `optimizer-comparison` | Keeps one training loop fixed while comparing SGD noise, Momentum, RMSProp, Adam, weight decay, schedules, and curve-based diagnoses of speed and stability. | Needs controlled seeds and budgets, matched hyperparameter rules, quantitative convergence/generalization comparisons, and an optimizer-specific divergence or instability case. | 合并现有“优化器对比”内容，使其对齐 optimizer-comparison 的证据闭环。 / merge the current Optimizer Comparison material into the evidence loop defined by optimizer-comparison. |
| `llm-rag` | `split` | `llm-inference-context`, `peft-lora`, `retrieval-rag-systems`, `llm-evaluation-reliability` | Separates RAG from training while covering token context, embedding similarity, chunk retrieval, prompt assembly, citation audit, and RAG evaluation. | Needs distinct executable evidence for context limits, LoRA adaptation, retrieval quality, answer faithfulness, hallucination cases, and evaluation reliability. | 拆分现有“LLM 与 RAG 基础”内容，使其对齐 llm-inference-context、peft-lora、retrieval-rag-systems、llm-evaluation-reliability 的证据闭环。 / split the current LLM and RAG Basics material into the evidence loop defined by llm-inference-context, peft-lora, retrieval-rag-systems, llm-evaluation-reliability. |
| `loss-functions` | `rebuild` | `loss-functions` | Links MSE and MAE sensitivity plus classification cross-entropy to likelihood, negative log-likelihood, and the MLE interpretation of familiar losses. | Needs code that verifies loss values and gradients on fixed examples, then contrasts outlier and overconfident-error behavior with learner explanations. | 重建现有“损失函数与似然”内容，使其对齐 loss-functions 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Loss Functions & Likelihood material into the evidence loop defined by loss-functions. |
| `gradient-descent` | `merge` | `gradient-descent` | Uses one interactive lab to connect a 3D loss surface, 2D contour map, negative-gradient updates, learning rate oscillation, saddle points, and batch noise. | Needs a from-scratch update trace checked numerically, reproducible learning-rate sweeps, explicit convergence evidence, and a divergence diagnosis checkpoint. | 合并现有“梯度下降”内容，使其对齐 gradient-descent 的证据闭环。 / merge the current Gradient Descent material into the evidence loop defined by gradient-descent. |
| `linear-regression` | `rebuild` | `linear-regression` | Moves from fitting a line through residual loss and parameter motion to multivariate inputs, polynomial limits, overfitting, and regularization. | Needs normal-equation and gradient solutions compared in code, residual diagnostics on held-out data, and a nonlinearity or collinearity failure case. | 重建现有“线性回归”内容，使其对齐 linear-regression 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Linear Regression material into the evidence loop defined by linear-regression. |
| `logistic-regression` | `rebuild` | `logistic-regression` | Traces linear scores through sigmoid probabilities, threshold decisions and log loss, then examines regularization and the limits of a linear boundary. | Needs a scratch gradient implementation matched to a library model, calibrated probability checks, and a nonlinearly separable failure example. | 重建现有“逻辑回归”内容，使其对齐 logistic-regression 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Logistic Regression material into the evidence loop defined by logistic-regression. |

| `mlp` | `rebuild` | `mlp` | Connects affine neurons and activations to hidden representations, forward output, backpropagation, training dynamics, capacity, and generalization. | Needs a NumPy forward/backward pass gradient-checked against finite differences, matched PyTorch training, hidden-layer probes, and saturation or overfit failures. | 重建现有“浅层 MLP”内容，使其对齐 mlp 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Shallow MLP material into the evidence loop defined by mlp. |

| `dataset-quality` | `keep` | `dataset-quality` | Separates missing, bad, duplicate and outlier policies; audits label timing, leakage, imbalance, group coverage, and produces a data-quality report. | Needs an executable data-quality decision record with assertions, before/after counts, group impact evidence, and a checkpoint that rejects an unsafe label or feature. | 保留现有“数据质量：缺失、标签与代表性”内容，使其对齐 dataset-quality 的证据闭环。 / keep the current Data Quality: Missingness, Labels, and Representativeness material into the evidence loop defined by dataset-quality. |
| `splits-generalization` | `keep` | `splits-generalization` | Treats random, stratified and temporal splits as evaluation contracts and makes fit-on-train/transform-everywhere parameters explicit in a reproducible protocol. | Needs code that proves set disjointness and parameter provenance, compares split strategies, and exposes entity or future-information leakage. | 保留现有“划分与泛化：让评估像未来一样未知”内容，使其对齐 splits-generalization 的证据闭环。 / keep the current Splits and Generalization: Make Evaluation Look Like the Future material into the evidence loop defined by splits-generalization. |
| `complexity-regularization` | `rebuild` | `complexity-regularization` | Links feature-width growth to train/validation curves, L2 weight budgets and early stopping, ending in a reviewable complexity-control report. | Needs controlled feature and regularization sweeps with dimension, weight, and validation metrics plus an overfit intervention justified from curves. | 重建现有“复杂度、正则化与损失曲线”内容，使其对齐 complexity-regularization 的证据闭环。 / rebuild the current Complexity, Regularization, and Loss Curves material into the evidence loop defined by complexity-regularization. |
